Events.Name: Hold @ 15
Events.Description:
Holds Cooldowns at 15% boss HP. 
Reccomended to use this for the first two dungeon bosses.

Events.Name: Group Hold
Events.Description:
Holds cooldowns at 40% HP, in packs greater than 3. 
Reccomended to toggle this manually before AOE during dungeons for best results.

Events.Name: HoC OT
Events.Description: Automatically gives HOC to cotank at 70%. This HP value is adjustable in conditions.

Events.Name: OT Aurora
Events.Description: Automatically grants your cotank aurora at 80% or less HP.

Events.Name: Automit TB
Events.Description: Automatically executes the best mitigation to handle an incoming tank buster.

Conditions.Name: Full HP Target
Conditions.Description: set to 95 to ensure entire pack of mobs are grouped first

Conditions.Name: Auto Buddymit
Conditions.Description: Condition requiring tank partner to be in combat with you.

Conditions.Name: Auto Aurora CoTank
Conditions.Description: Condition requiring tank partner to be in combat with you.

Logics.Name: Enable CDs
Logics.Description:
Automatically reenables cooldowns when detecting an enemy with nearly full HP.
Set to >60% default.

Logics.Name: Broken Group Hold
Logics.Description: Leaving in for further testing, broken subcondition functions at the moment.

Items.Name: Last Boss
Items.Description: Enables burn boss at 5 percent HP boss health. Enable this for the last boss of a dungeon, or for any trial/raid with only one phase.

Items.Name: Sprint OOC
Items.Description: Sprints if you are not in combat

Items.Name: Aggro Mng
Items.Description: Will use lightning shot and provoke to make sure every mob you are in combat with has aggro on you.
